name: Connectivity Diagnostic
description: An introductory template executing harmless, lightweight queries to check active credentials, schemas, and API scoping on all 4 sources.

queries.label: Coral Catalog Schemas
queries.sql:
SELECT SCHEMA_NAME,
       COUNT(*) AS table_count
FROM coral.tables
GROUP BY SCHEMA_NAME

queries.label: GitHub API Scopes
queries.sql:
SELECT name,
       full_name
FROM github.user_repos
LIMIT 1

queries.label: Linear API Check
queries.sql:
SELECT name,
       email
FROM linear.users
LIMIT 1

queries.label: Slack Scopes Ping
queries.sql:
SELECT name,
       num_members
FROM slack.channels
LIMIT 1

ai_persona.name: Integration Diagnostic Agent
ai_persona.system_prompt: You are a Diagnostic Assistant. Evaluate the connectivity datasets, confirm that APIs are returning clean payloads, and highlight any connection timeouts or scope failures.
ai_persona.synthesis_prompt: Examine if any of the pings failed or came back empty. Provide a checklist showing which of the four systems are CONNECTED or DISCONNECTED. List recommendations if credentials lack required scopes.
